protocol.name: vwl_vout_image_capture_source_unstable_v1

description.summary: capture sources for vwl virtual outputs

protocol.description:
This protocol exposes compositor-defined virtual outputs as image capture sources. The caller provides a vout identifier and receives an ext_image_capture_source_v1 object suitable for ext_image_copy_capture_v1.
The vout identifiers are compositor-specific. In vwl they match the ids reported by the IPC snapshot.

interface.name: vwl_vout_image_capture_source_manager_v1

description.summary: manager for vout image capture sources

interface.description: Creates image capture sources for vwl virtual outputs.

request.name: create_source
request.description: Create an ext_image_capture_source_v1 for the virtual output identified by vout_id.
